shortDescription.text: Component uses a licence that is blocked by policy.

fullDescription.text: The component's declared SPDX licence identifier is on the organisation's blocklist (AGPL-3.0, GPL-3.0, SSPL-1.0, BUSL-1.1). Remove or replace the component before shipping.

help.text: Component uses a licence that is blocked by policy.
help.markdown:
**BlockedLicense** — The component's declared SPDX licence identifier is on the organisation's blocklist (AGPL-3.0, GPL-3.0, SSPL-1.0, BUSL-1.1). Remove or replace the component before shipping.

See [https://github.com/sap-oss/sbom-pipeline/blob/main/scripts/sbom-lineage/policy.yaml](https://github.com/sap-oss/sbom-pipeline/blob/main/scripts/sbom-lineage/policy.yaml)

shortDescription.text: Component licence requires legal/OSS review before use.

fullDescription.text: The component uses a weak-copyleft licence (LGPL, MPL, EUPL). Obtain written approval from the OSS Legal team before shipping.

help.text: Component licence requires legal/OSS review before use.
help.markdown:
**RequiresApproval** — The component uses a weak-copyleft licence (LGPL, MPL, EUPL). Obtain written approval from the OSS Legal team before shipping.

See [https://github.com/sap-oss/sbom-pipeline/blob/main/scripts/sbom-lineage/policy.yaml](https://github.com/sap-oss/sbom-pipeline/blob/main/scripts/sbom-lineage/policy.yaml)

fullDescription.text: The component's BOM entry declares 'NOASSERTION' as its licence. Legal review is required before including this component in a shipped product.

help.markdown:
**MissingLicense** — The component's BOM entry declares 'NOASSERTION' as its licence. Legal review is required before including this component in a shipped product.

See [https://www.ntia.doc.gov/report/2021/minimum-elements-software-bill-materials-sbom](https://www.ntia.doc.gov/report/2021/minimum-elements-software-bill-materials-sbom)

shortDescription.text: BOM is missing an NTIA minimum element.

fullDescription.text: The BOM does not satisfy all seven NTIA minimum elements: supplier, name, version, other unique identifiers, dependency relationships, author, and timestamp.

help.text: BOM is missing an NTIA minimum element.
help.markdown:
**NtiaIncomplete** — The BOM does not satisfy all seven NTIA minimum elements: supplier, name, version, other unique identifiers, dependency relationships, author, and timestamp.

See [https://www.ntia.doc.gov/report/2021/minimum-elements-software-bill-materials-sbom](https://www.ntia.doc.gov/report/2021/minimum-elements-software-bill-materials-sbom)

shortDescription.text: Discovered source licence differs from declared BOM licence.

fullDescription.text: The SPDX identifiers found in source files do not match the licence declared in the CycloneDX BOM. Update one or both to ensure consistency.

help.text: Discovered source licence differs from declared BOM licence.
help.markdown:
**SpdxLicenseMismatch** — The SPDX identifiers found in source files do not match the licence declared in the CycloneDX BOM. Update one or both to ensure consistency.

See [https://reuse.software/spec/](https://reuse.software/spec/)

message.text: [vllm-main] BLOCKED_LICENSE: component 'html2text' (licence: GPL-3.0-or-later) | fixedIn: No drop-in upgrade; replace with markdownify (MIT) or bleach (Apache-2.0) | alternative: pkg:pypi/markdownify@0.13.1

suppressions.justification: Same rationale as SUP-001. html2text is used by vLLM for converting HTML documentation to plain text during model inference. SAP does not distribute this component. Alternative: markdownify (MIT) or bleach (Apache-2.0). Upstream fix required at vllm-project/vllm.

message.text: [vllm-main] BLOCKED_LICENSE: component 'rfc3987' (licence: GPL-3.0-or-later) | fixedIn: No drop-in upgrade; replace with rfc3986 (Apache-2.0) or uri-template (MIT) | alternative: pkg:pypi/rfc3986@1.5.0

suppressions.justification: vllm-main is an audit-only reference BOM for the upstream vLLM project (Apache-2.0, https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm). SAP does not distribute vLLM or rfc3987; the BOM is generated for supply-chain visibility only. rfc3987 is used internally by vLLM for IRI parsing and is never exposed in SAP products. Upstream remediation: replace rfc3987 with rfc3986 (Apache-2.0) or uri-template (MIT). Tracked at vllm-project/vllm.
